args.description: Step 1: Read source architecture (src listing, module decls, key entry points)
Step 2: Read recent history (JOURNAL.md last 10 entries, git log last 10 commits)
Step 3: Read memory files (active_learnings, active_social_learnings)
Step 4: Self-test (bounded checks: help, state CLI)
Step 5: Analyze evolution history (gh run list)
Step 6: Read yoagent-state feedback (state tail, why, hotspots, cache)
Step 7: Audit upstream dependency boundaries
Step 8: Research competitors (minimal)
Step 9: Check backlog (agent-self issues)
Step 10: Write assessment to session_plan/assessment.md
